calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Marjorie Golub, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lawrence Kaminsky M.D.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Wilson Altaminranda and Spectrum Laser as follows:
Principal $9,900.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,470.00
Costs $295.50, for a total of $11,665.50

Marjorie Golub for plaintiff and moving party Lawrence Kaminsky
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Lawrence Kainsky's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP Section 1005.
